metadata.description: Claude Code plugins with mostly skills for founders, developers, and web3 builders

plugins.name: gh-cli
plugins.description: Skill: Full GitHub CLI capabilities for repos & code

plugins.name: chrome-extension-wxt
plugins.description: Skill: Build Chrome extensions with WXT framework

plugins.name: cloudflare-workers
plugins.description: Skill: Rapid development with Cloudflare Workers - build and deploy serverless applications

plugins.name: skill-finder
plugins.description: Skill: Find and evaluate Claude skills using semantic search and quality assessment

plugins.name: skill-factory
plugins.description: Skill: Autonomous skill creation with automatic quality assurance - analyzes requests, selects optimal creation method, and delivers production-ready skills

plugins.name: uv-ruff-python-tools
plugins.description: Skill: Modern Python development with uv (10-100x faster package manager) and ruff (extremely fast linter/formatter) - Astral's fast tooling suite

plugins.name: solana
plugins.description: Comprehensive Solana development toolkit: build programs with Anchor/native Rust and audit for security vulnerabilities

plugins.name: frontend-dev
plugins.description: Frontend toolkit: React/TypeScript, Tailwind/shadcn, TanStack (Query, Router, Start), Vite, and Biome

plugins.name: founder-playbook
plugins.description: Skill: Decision validation and thinking frameworks for startup founders - pressure-test decisions with proven methodologies and crypto/web3 knowledge

plugins.name: foundry-solidity
plugins.description: Skill: Build and test Solidity smart contracts with Foundry toolkit (Forge, Cast, Anvil) - testing patterns, deployment scripts, and modern Solidity 0.8.30

plugins.name: impactful-writing
plugins.description: Skill: Write clear, emotionally resonant, and well-structured content across any platform - research-backed principles for Twitter, articles, docs, emails, and more

plugins.name: erc-8004
plugins.description: Skill: Build with ERC-8004 Trustless Agents - on-chain agent identity, reputation, and discovery using the Agent0 SDK

plugins.name: x402
plugins.description: Skill: Build internet-native payments with the x402 open protocol - HTTP 402 for APIs, AI agents, and web services across EVM and Solana

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Skill: Opinionated Python development setup with uv, ty, ruff, pytest, and just

plugins.name: web3-protocol-gtm
plugins.description: Skill: Go-to-market strategy for web3 infrastructure and protocol projects - community growth, CT narrative, developer relations, ecosystem partnerships, and launch sequencing
